TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Kavalan, story: KacCon-Teaching Weaving_abas_ipay
TEXT.citation: Sung, L. M., Lily, I., Hsieh, F., & Lin, Z. (2008). Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages. Taiwan Journal of Linguistics, 6(2.).
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @article{sung2008developing,title={Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages.},author={Sung, Li-May and Lily, I and Hsieh, Fuhui and Lin, Zhemin and others},journal={Taiwan Journal of Linguistics},volume={6},number={2},year={2008}}

S.FORM: temawaR Raw qa qatiw sa taqsian aimi temawaR smanu a kay kayhuiniq qaRabi nani.
S.PHON: təmawaʁ ʁaw qa qatiw sa taqsian aimi təmawaʁ smanu a kaj kajhuiniq qaʁaβi nani.
S.FORM: temawaR Raw qa qatiw sa taqsian aimi temawaR smanu a kay kayhuiniq qaRabi nani.
S.PHON: təmawaʁ ʁaw qa qatiw sa taqsian aimi təmawaʁ smanu a kaj kajhuiniq qaʁaβi nani.
S.TRANSL: 我們明天要去學校,我們昨天晚上開會說的.
We'll go to school tomorrow; this is announced at our meeting last night.

S.FORM: m i azas ala tu benina pibeRuR tu benina nani azas tu Raq zinku qaniau sa sa saspawan saspawan zinku siRab qaRabi 'nay sinsi yau nani.
S.PHON: m i az~ras ara tu βənina piβəʁuʁ tu βənina nani az~ras tu ʁaq z~rinku qaniau sa sa saspawan saspawan z~rinku siʁaβ qaʁaβi ʔnaj sinsi jau nani.
S.FORM: m i azas ala tu benina pibeRuR tu benina nani azas tu Raq zinku qaniau sa sa saspawan saspawan zinku siRab qaRabi 'nay sinsi yau nani.
S.PHON: m i az~ras ara tu βənina piβəʁuʁ tu βənina nani az~ras tu ʁaq z~rinku qaniau sa sa saspawan saspawan z~rinku siʁaβ qaʁaβi ʔnaj sinsi jau nani.
S.TRANSL: 我跟他們講要帶香蕉,要砍香蕉樹,還要帶酒.要倒酒的,我昨天跟領班說了.
I told them that they should bring bananas for cutting and that they should also bring wine. For pouring wine, I told this to the leader last night.

S.FORM: amawaR si ka walu duki si qawtukati kalamazpaita qayau maqzi tataipaqanay lazat.
S.PHON: amawaʁ si ka waru ɮuki si qawtukati karamaz~rpaita qajau maqz~ri tataipaqanaj raz~rat.
S.FORM: amawaR si ka walu duki si qawtukati kalamazpaita qayau maqzi tataipaqanay lazat.
S.PHON: amawaʁ si ka waru ɮuki si qawtukati karamaz~rpaita qajau maqz~ri tataipaqanaj raz~rat.
S.TRANSL: 我們明天八點早點來,有從台北來的人.
We should come early at o'clock tomorrow; there are people from Taipei.

S.FORM: tmaita timaita m m mpasyasingay.
S.PHON: tmaita timaita m m mpasjasiŋaj.
S.FORM: tmaita timaita m m mpasyasingay.
S.PHON: tmaita timaita m m mpasjasiŋaj.

TRANSL.notes: (他們)來看我們、照相.

S.TRANSL: 來看我們、照相.

TRANSL.notes: (They come) to see us and take pictures.

S.TRANSL: to see us and take pictures.

S.FORM: tu bibeRuR tu benina nani zinna X sunis a yau nani kin kinspat sunis a yau tazungan Runanay uzusa.
S.PHON: tu βiβəʁuʁ tu βənina nani z~rinna * sunis a jau nani kin kinspat sunis a jau taz~ruŋan ʁunanaj uz~rusa.
S.FORM: tu bibeRuR tu benina nani zinna X sunis a yau nani kin kinspat sunis a yau tazungan Runanay uzusa.
S.PHON: tu βiβəʁuʁ tu βənina nani z~rinna * sunis a jau nani kin kinspat sunis a jau taz~ruŋan ʁunanaj uz~rusa.

TRANSL.notes: (來看我們)砍香蕉樹的嗎? 四個女孩子兩個男的.

S.TRANSL: 砍香蕉樹的嗎? 四個女孩子兩個男的.

TRANSL.notes: (To see us) cut banana trees? Four girls and two boys.

S.TRANSL: cut banana trees? Four girls and two boys.

S.FORM: titiana ya sanis aisu.
S.PHON: titiana ja sanis aisu.
S.FORM: titiana ya sanis aisu.
S.PHON: titiana ja sanis aisu.
S.TRANSL: 是誰要削香蕉樹皮?是你嗎?
Who is going to bark banana trees? Is that you?

S.FORM: ita quniannapa tmud tu sunis a yau sanisay ka.
S.PHON: ita quniannapa tmuɮ tu sunis a jau sanisaj ka.
S.FORM: ita quniannapa tmud tu sunis a yau sanisay ka.
S.PHON: ita quniannapa tmuɮ tu sunis a jau sanisaj ka.

TRANSL.notes: 我不知道是誰要去教小孩子(台北來的學生).

S.TRANSL: 我不知道是誰要去教小孩子 .

TRANSL.notes: I don't know who is going to teach the children (i.e. the students from Taipei).

S.TRANSL: I don't know who is going to teach the children .

S.FORM: 1aw1 aisu mtuday 2tu sunis a yau2 2tudaka sunis a yau2 tu sanisan si u punti pibeRuR sanispama si.
S.PHON: *aw* aisu mtuɮaj *tu sunis a jau* *tuɮaka sunis a jau* tu sanisan si u punti piβəʁuʁ sanispama si.
S.FORM: 1aw1 aisu mtuday 2tu sunis a yau2 2tudaka sunis a yau2 tu sanisan si u punti pibeRuR sanispama si.
S.PHON: *aw* aisu mtuɮaj *tu sunis a jau* *tuɮaka sunis a jau* tu sanisan si u punti piβəʁuʁ sanispama si.
S.TRANSL: 我要教小孩子削香蕉樹皮. 就是你要去教小孩子. 嗯... 先把香蕉樹砍好,再削樹皮.
It's you who will teach the children. I'll teach the children to bark banana trees. Um... After cutting down banana trees, peel off the bark.

S.FORM: punti smanis si pawaRiti si nutuzti m s sanis sinasti si nutuzti zinna.
S.PHON: punti smanis si pawaʁiti si nutuz~rti m s sanis sinasti si nutuz~rti z~rinna.
S.FORM: punti smanis si pawaRiti si nutuzti m s sanis sinasti si nutuzti zinna.
S.PHON: punti smanis si pawaʁiti si nutuz~rti m s sanis sinasti si nutuz~rti z~rinna.
S.TRANSL: 剝完香蕉樹皮後,把樹皮曬乾然後接結...削樹皮...分線絲,然後接結.
After barking banana trees, dry the bark and braid...bark...tear the bark into threads, and then braid the threads.

S.FORM: kinspat 1sunis a yau1 1qumqumni1 iza maiseng 2ala2 alapaiku tu 3maisengay3 3tu maisengay3 4sasanisan4 4alapaiku tu maiseng4 paqenanemisu baibudan.
S.PHON: kinspat *sunis a jau* *qumqumni* iz~ra maisəŋ *ara* arapaiku tu *maisəŋaj* *tu maisəŋaj* *sasanisan* *arapaiku tu maisəŋ* paqənanəmisu βaiβuɮan.
S.FORM: kinspat 1sunis a yau1 1qumqumni1 iza maiseng 2ala2 alapaiku tu 3maisengay3 3tu maisengay3 4sasanisan4 4alapaiku tu maiseng4 paqenanemisu baibudan.
S.PHON: kinspat *sunis a jau* *qumqumni* iz~ra maisəŋ *ara* arapaiku tu *maisəŋaj* *tu maisəŋaj* *sasanisan* *arapaiku tu maisəŋ* paqənanəmisu βaiβuɮan.

TRANSL.notes: [翻譯漏失] 還沒曬乾怎麼(弄線)呢? 我要拿曬乾的. 乾的是要用來削樹皮的. 我要拿曬乾的. 只有你一個老人家嗎?

S.TRANSL: [翻譯漏失] 還沒曬乾怎麼 呢? 我要拿曬乾的. 乾的是要用來削樹皮的. 我要拿曬乾的. 只有你一個老人家嗎?

TRANSL.notes: [Translation missing] How could you (braid the threads) without drying (the bark) first? I'll take the dried (bark). The dried (bark) is for barking. I'll take the dried (bark). Are you the only elder?

S.TRANSL: [Translation missing] How could you without drying first? I'll take the dried . The dried is for barking. I'll take the dried . Are you the only elder?

S.FORM: mituRung yau mituRungti alapati tu mituRung sanaqnaqu si.
S.PHON: mituʁuŋ jau mituʁuŋti arapati tu mituʁuŋ sanaqnaqu si.
S.FORM: mituRung yau mituRungti alapati tu mituRung sanaqnaqu si.
S.PHON: mituʁuŋ jau mituʁuŋti arapati tu mituʁuŋ sanaqnaqu si.

TRANSL.notes: (我)會拿用香蕉樹皮撕下的線做成的線球,(教學生)就這樣弄.

S.TRANSL: 會拿用香蕉樹皮撕下的線做成的線球, 就這樣弄.

TRANSL.notes: (I'll) take the ball of banana threads and (teach students) to do so.

S.TRANSL: take the ball of banana threads and to do so.

S.FORM: u mituRung 'nay tu snazauay mituRung.
S.PHON: u mituʁuŋ ʔnaj tu snaz~rauaj mituʁuŋ.
S.FORM: u mituRung 'nay tu snazauay mituRung.
S.PHON: u mituʁuŋ ʔnaj tu snaz~rauaj mituʁuŋ.
S.TRANSL: 嗯. 這個就是用香蕉樹皮撕下的線做成的線球.
Um. This is the ball of banana threads.

S.FORM: u temawaR tayan sataitaanna.
S.PHON: u təmawaʁ tajan sataitaanna.
S.FORM: u temawaR tayan sataitaanna.
S.PHON: u təmawaʁ tajan sataitaanna.
S.TRANSL: 嗯. 明天在那邊的時候要看的.
Um. This is to be seen there tomorrow.

S.FORM: Ralis qatuRuzaansu punti miza si Risayti Risaytiimi.
S.PHON: ʁaris qatuʁuz~raansu punti miz~ra si ʁisajti ʁisajtiimi.
S.FORM: Ralis qatuRuzaansu punti miza si Risayti Risaytiimi.
S.PHON: ʁaris qatuʁuz~raansu punti miz~ra si ʁisajti ʁisajtiimi.
S.TRANSL: 你可以馬上做完嗎? 做完了的時候,我們會把線纏繞在織布機上.
Can you finish it immediately? After finishing this, we'll wind threads onto the loom.

W.TRANSL: 把線纏繞在織布機上=完成
把線纏繞在織布機上=完成=1EPL.主格

S.FORM: azas a 1yau1 Risayan tayan 2Raw2 1yau1 2yau2 tayan uzusa 3Risayan tenunan3 tayan 3o m3 tenunti tayan qaya si.
S.PHON: az~ras a *jau* ʁisajan tajan *ʁaw* *jau* *jau* tajan uz~rusa *ʁisajan tənunan* tajan ** m* tənunti tajan qaja si.
S.FORM: azas a 1yau1 Risayan tayan 2Raw2 1yau1 2yau2 tayan uzusa 3Risayan tenunan3 tayan 3o m3 tenunti tayan qaya si.
S.PHON: az~ras a *jau* ʁisajan tajan *ʁaw* *jau* *jau* tajan uz~rusa *ʁisajan tənunan* tajan ** m* tənunti tajan qaja si.
S.TRANSL: 帶用來將線繞在織布機上的工具. 那邊有兩台織布機. - 我們在那邊織布.
Bring the tool for winding threads onto the loom. There are two looms there. - We'll weave there.

W.TRANSL: 把線繞在織布機上-名物化
把線繞在織布機上-名物化

S.FORM: yau qa qawanay pataqsian 'nay saiza tmenun Risayti Risayti X en tud zanti nitudsu ya 1pataqsian 'nay1.
S.PHON: jau qa qawanaj pataqsian ʔnaj saiz~ra tmənun ʁisajti ʁisajti * ən tuɮ z~ranti nituɮsu ja *pataqsian ʔnaj*.
S.FORM: yau qa qawanay pataqsian 'nay saiza tmenun Risayti Risayti X en tud zanti nitudsu ya 1pataqsian 'nay1.
S.PHON: jau qa qawanaj pataqsian ʔnaj saiz~ra tmənun ʁisajti ʁisajti * ən tuɮ z~ranti nituɮsu ja *pataqsian ʔnaj*.
S.TRANSL: 那些學生要練習織布嗎?I: 他們把線繞在織布機上. 之前你有教過學生嗎?
Will the students practice weaving? They wound threads onto the loom. Have you taught students before?

W.TRANSL: 把線繞在織布機上=完成
把線繞在織布機上=完成

S.FORM: 1nitudanti1 nayau ngatu ngatuti 2azasannapa na pataqsian a yau saiza ya pitnunan2 alaannapa ya azasannapa temawaR si tenunan yauti uzusa.
S.PHON: *nituɮanti* najau ŋatu ŋatuti *az~rasannapa na pataqsian a jau saiz~ra ja pitnunan* araannapa ja az~rasannapa təmawaʁ si tənunan jauti uz~rusa.
S.FORM: 1nitudanti1 nayau ngatu ngatuti 2azasannapa na pataqsian a yau saiza ya pitnunan2 alaannapa ya azasannapa temawaR si tenunan yauti uzusa.
S.PHON: *nituɮanti* najau ŋatu ŋatuti *az~rasannapa na pataqsian a jau saiz~ra ja pitnunan* araannapa ja az~rasannapa təmawaʁ si tənunan jauti uz~rusa.

TRANSL.notes: 沒有教的很完整(一半一半的教). 我們編的東西學生要帶走嗎? 做完的布有兩個,他們明天要帶走.

S.TRANSL: 沒有教的很完整 . 我們編的東西學生要帶走嗎? 做完的布有兩個,他們明天要帶走.

TRANSL.notes: I didn't teach them the complete process (I only taught them by halves). Will the students take away what we've woven? There are two bolts of cloth and they'll take them away tomorrow.

S.TRANSL: I didn't teach them the complete process . Will the students take away what we've woven? There are two bolts of cloth and they'll take them away tomorrow.

S.FORM: a azasti aiku tu benina tu nisyangatuku taRbabiay 'nay.
S.PHON: a az~rasti aiku tu βənina tu nisjaŋatuku taʁβaβiaj ʔnaj.
S.FORM: a azasti aiku tu benina tu nisyangatuku taRbabiay 'nay.
S.PHON: a az~rasti aiku tu βənina tu nisjaŋatuku taʁβaβiaj ʔnaj.
S.TRANSL: - 我要帶早上開始做的香蕉.
- I'll bring the banana bark which I started to do in the morning.

S.FORM: tanianpati pibeRuR tu benina.
S.PHON: tanianpati piβəʁuʁ tu βənina.
S.FORM: tanianpati pibeRuR tu benina.
S.PHON: tanianpati piβəʁuʁ tu βənina.
S.TRANSL: 在哪裡砍香蕉樹?
Where will you chop banana trees?

S.FORM: tipanbulungan.
S.PHON: tipanβuruŋan.
S.FORM: tipanbulungan.
S.PHON: tipanβuruŋan.
S.TRANSL: 潘武郎那邊嗎?
At Utai's place?

S.FORM: yau tatuqeban na zana na sa'mayan na qaqu ya kwa.
S.PHON: jau tatuqəβan na z~rana na saʔmajan na qaqu ja kwa.
S.FORM: yau tatuqeban na zana na sa'mayan na qaqu ya kwa.
S.PHON: jau tatuqəβan na z~rana na saʔmajan na qaqu ja kwa.
S.TRANSL: 在學校廚房的後面.
In back of the school kitchen.

S.FORM: yau kwa tatuqeban ah usa nipadumaanna ni asing.
S.PHON: jau kwa tatuqəβan ah usa nipaɮumaanna ni asiŋ.
S.FORM: yau kwa tatuqeban ah usa nipadumaanna ni asing.
S.PHON: jau kwa tatuqəβan ah usa nipaɮumaanna ni asiŋ.

TRANSL.notes: 有(香蕉樹)啊,在(學校廚房)後面. 不是Asing種的嗎?

S.TRANSL: 有 啊,在 後面. 不是Asing種的嗎?

TRANSL.notes: There are (banana trees) in back of (the school kitchen). Aren't they planted by Asing?

S.TRANSL: There are in back of . Aren't they planted by Asing?

S.FORM: zana situan zana qaqu 'nay tazian zana ni zau 'nay zani tibanday ni.
S.PHON: z~rana situan z~rana qaqu ʔnaj taz~rian z~rana ni z~rau ʔnaj z~rani tiβanɮaj ni.
S.FORM: zana situan zana qaqu 'nay tazian zana ni zau 'nay zani tibanday ni.
S.PHON: z~rana situan z~rana qaqu ʔnaj taz~rian z~rana ni z~rau ʔnaj z~rani tiβanɮaj ni.
S.TRANSL: 學生種的學校管,這邊的是這個...那個...偕萬來的.

TRANSL.notes: Those (banana trees planted by) students (belong to) the school. Those at this place (belong to) ...... Banday.

S.TRANSL: Those students the school. Those at this place ...... Banday.

S.FORM: zani bandayay.
S.PHON: z~rani βanɮajaj.
S.FORM: zani bandayay.
S.PHON: z~rani βanɮajaj.
S.TRANSL: 偕萬來的.
Banday's.

S.FORM: talibengay iki a kwa zani bandayay benina Raw tayanpati pibeRuR saiza.
S.PHON: tariβəŋaj iki a kwa z~rani βanɮajaj βənina ʁaw tajanpati piβəʁuʁ saiz~ra.
S.FORM: talibengay iki a kwa zani bandayay benina Raw tayanpati pibeRuR saiza.
S.PHON: tariβəŋaj iki a kwa z~rani βanɮajaj βənina ʁaw tajanpati piβəʁuʁ saiz~ra.
S.TRANSL: 池塘下面的. 是偕萬來的香蕉樹嗎?可能在那邊砍香蕉樹.

TRANSL.notes: Those down the pond. Are they Banday's banana trees? Perhaps (we'll) chop (banana trees) there.

S.TRANSL: Those down the pond. Are they Banday's banana trees? Perhaps chop there.

S.FORM: tayanti usiq ma si alapa tu benina yau si.
S.PHON: tajanti usiq ma si arapa tu βənina jau si.
S.FORM: tayanti usiq ma si alapa tu benina yau si.
S.PHON: tajanti usiq ma si arapa tu βənina jau si.
S.TRANSL: 只會拿一棵.
We'll take only one banana tree.

S.FORM: u alapati tu azat a zauay benina saRabasay si.
S.PHON: u arapati tu az~rat a z~rauaj βənina saʁaβasaj si.
S.FORM: u alapati tu azat a zauay benina saRabasay si.
S.PHON: u arapati tu az~rat a z~rauaj βənina saʁaβasaj si.
S.TRANSL: - 會拿這麼小的香蕉樹.

TRANSL.notes: -- (We'll) take the banana tree which is this short.

S.TRANSL: - take the banana tree which is this short.

S.FORM: sapaqaitaan tu nazauay benina tizi Raw tmnun Raw tmnun tayan si qayauti tmnun si yau benina a yau.
S.PHON: sapaqaitaan tu naz~rauaj βənina tiz~ri ʁaw tmnun ʁaw tmnun tajan si qajauti tmnun si jau βənina a jau.
S.FORM: sapaqaitaan tu nazauay benina tizi Raw tmnun Raw tmnun tayan si qayauti tmnun si yau benina a yau.
S.PHON: sapaqaitaan tu naz~rauaj βənina tiz~ri ʁaw tmnun ʁaw tmnun tajan si qajauti tmnun si jau βənina a jau.
S.TRANSL: 要拿給他們看的香蕉原來是這種的. 要在那邊編織的話,有香蕉樹.

TRANSL.notes: This is the kind of banana tree which is to be shown to (the students). If we are to weave there, there are banana trees.

S.TRANSL: This is the kind of banana tree which is to be shown to . If we are to weave there, there are banana trees.

S.FORM: naquniay zau benina zau sangian a zauay benina.
S.PHON: naquniaj z~rau βənina z~rau saŋian a z~rauaj βənina.
S.FORM: naquniay zau benina zau sangian a zauay benina.
S.PHON: naquniaj z~rau βənina z~rau saŋian a z~rauaj βənina.

TRANSL.notes: 要做的是像那樣的香蕉(指上面所提到的那種小的香蕉樹).

S.TRANSL: 要做的是像那樣的香蕉 .

TRANSL.notes: The banana tree we'll do is this kind (i.e. the short banana trees mentioned above).

S.TRANSL: The banana tree we'll do is this kind .

S.FORM: zinkupati qaya smanu saiza.
S.PHON: z~rinkupati qaja smanu saiz~ra.
S.FORM: zinkupati qaya smanu saiza.
S.PHON: z~rinkupati qaja smanu saiz~ra.

TRANSL.notes: 我這樣講(給那些大學生聽).

S.TRANSL: 我這樣講 .

TRANSL.notes: I told (the students) thus.

S.TRANSL: I told thus.

S.FORM: qakinani Rakiaan mawtuay taipaqay lazat Rakinani smani nitingaRna 'nay paqnanem qawini 'nay sunis a yau zinna.
S.PHON: qakinani ʁakiaan mawtuaj taipaqaj raz~rat ʁakinani smani nitiŋaʁna ʔnaj paqnanəm qawini ʔnaj sunis a jau z~rinna.
S.FORM: qakinani Rakiaan mawtuay taipaqay lazat Rakinani smani nitingaRna 'nay paqnanem qawini 'nay sunis a yau zinna.
S.PHON: qakinani ʁakiaan mawtuaj taipaqaj raz~rat ʁakinani smani nitiŋaʁna ʔnaj paqnanəm qawini ʔnaj sunis a jau z~rinna.

TRANSL.notes: 多少台北人要來? 叫幾個人(來)不知道. 就只有一個那個小孩子要來.

S.TRANSL: 多少台北人要來? 叫幾個人 不知道. 就只有一個那個小孩子要來.

TRANSL.notes: How many people from Taipei will come? I don't know how many people are told (to come). Only one child (will come).

S.TRANSL: How many people from Taipei will come? I don't know how many people are told . Only one child .

S.FORM: taitaakita si.
S.PHON: taitaakita si.
S.FORM: taitaakita si.
S.PHON: taitaakita si.
S.TRANSL: 我們看看.
Let's see.

S.FORM: yauti Raciang tiana X yau dadu tiRaciang yauti tiRaciang iza mi mai qa mai syuqai tu sikawmaan si taRnina qaya na taypaqay.
S.PHON: jauti ʁaʦiaŋ tiana * jau ɮaɮu tiʁaʦiaŋ jauti tiʁaʦiaŋ iz~ra mi mai qa mai sjuqai tu sikawmaan si taʁnina qaja na tajpaqaj.
S.FORM: yauti Raciang tiana X yau dadu tiRaciang yauti tiRaciang iza mi mai qa mai syuqai tu sikawmaan si taRnina qaya na taypaqay.
S.PHON: jauti ʁaʦiaŋ tiana * jau ɮaɮu tiʁaʦiaŋ jauti tiʁaʦiaŋ iz~ra mi mai qa mai sjuqai tu sikawmaan si taʁnina qaja na tajpaqaj.

TRANSL.notes: 有潘金英,還有誰... 一定有潘金英.沒有介紹我們的語言的話(翻譯我們的語言),台北的人就不會知道.

S.TRANSL: 有潘金英,還有誰... 一定有潘金英.沒有介紹我們的語言的話 ,台北的人就不會知道.

TRANSL.notes: There is Raciang, and who... There will be Raciang for sure. If there is no one to introduce (i.e. translate) what we say, people from Taipei cannot understand it.

S.TRANSL: There is Raciang, and who... There will be Raciang for sure. If there is no one to introduce what we say, people from Taipei cannot understand it.

S.FORM: qayau tangkebalantiisu yauti kaysiakuay.
S.PHON: qajau taŋkəβarantiisu jauti kajsiakuaj.
S.FORM: qayau tangkebalantiisu yauti kaysiakuay.
S.PHON: qajau taŋkəβarantiisu jauti kajsiakuaj.
S.TRANSL: 你講噶瑪蘭,要有人翻譯.
You speak Kavalan. There must be an interpreter.

S.FORM: o zinna o.
S.PHON: * z~rinna *.
S.FORM: o zinna o.
S.PHON: * z~rinna *.

S.FORM: tibunsin u qumuni smani kaysiaku tu ya kaysiaku tu tu sikawkawmaanku tu sa paipil tu 'nay busus a yau XXXX nayauanta qumtun nayauanta qumtun nazauanta smanis nayauanta qawani tiRaciang si yu zinku yu spaR sikawkawma zinna qawani tiRaciang spaRay mikaysiku tu sikawmaan X 'nay nayau saiza nani.
S.PHON: tiβunsin u qumuni smani kajsiaku tu ja kajsiaku tu tu sikawkawmaanku tu sa paipir tu ʔnaj βusus a jau **** najauanta qumtun najauanta qumtun naz~rauanta smanis najauanta qawani tiʁaʦiaŋ si ju z~rinku ju spaʁ sikawkawma z~rinna qawani tiʁaʦiaŋ spaʁaj mikajsiku tu sikawmaan * ʔnaj najau saiz~ra nani.
S.FORM: tibunsin u qumuni smani kaysiaku tu ya kaysiaku tu tu sikawkawmaanku tu sa paipil tu 'nay busus a yau XXXX nayauanta qumtun nayauanta qumtun nazauanta smanis nayauanta qawani tiRaciang si yu zinku yu spaR sikawkawma zinna qawani tiRaciang spaRay mikaysiku tu sikawmaan X 'nay nayau saiza nani.
S.PHON: tiβunsin u qumuni smani kajsiaku tu ja kajsiaku tu tu sikawkawmaanku tu sa paipir tu ʔnaj βusus a jau **** najauanta qumtun najauanta qumtun naz~rauanta smanis najauanta qawani tiʁaʦiaŋ si ju z~rinku ju spaʁ sikawkawma z~rinna qawani tiʁaʦiaŋ spaʁaj mikajsiku tu sikawmaan * ʔnaj najau saiz~ra nani.
S.TRANSL: 是Bunsin還是誰要翻譯不知道. 翻譯.... 翻譯我講的話. 給閩南人聽. 就是這樣剪,這樣刮樹皮. 我想一定是Raciang. 她很會講話. 一定是Raciang,她會翻譯我們的話. 可能是那樣.

TRANSL.notes: I don't know it's Bunsin or someone else that will translate (what we said). Translate... Translate what I said. To make people of Southern Min understand (what I say). We cut in that way and bark banana trees in this way. It must be Raciang, I think. She is eloquent. It must be Raciang, who can translate what we say. Perhaps.

S.TRANSL: I don't know it's Bunsin or someone else that will translate . Translate... Translate what I said. To make people of Southern Min understand . We cut in that way and bark banana trees in this way. It must be Raciang, I think. She is eloquent. It must be Raciang, who can translate what we say. Perhaps.

S.FORM: m punti qunipati smani.
S.PHON: m punti qunipati smani.
S.FORM: m punti qunipati smani.
S.PHON: m punti qunipati smani.
S.TRANSL: - 做完了,還有什麼工作?
- After finishing the job, I don't know what we're going to do?

S.FORM: alati tu Raq punti tenun saqabiyan u saqutuan qumuni smani.
S.PHON: arati tu ʁaq punti tənun saqaβijan u saqutuan qumuni smani.
S.FORM: alati tu Raq punti tenun saqabiyan u saqutuan qumuni smani.
S.PHON: arati tu ʁaq punti tənun saqaβijan u saqutuan qumuni smani.
S.TRANSL: 我們會帶酒,在一天或半天內編織完後,我不知道要做什麼.
We'll bring wine, after finishing weaving in one day or half a day. I don't know what to do.

S.FORM: X Ralis punti nayau si pasyasin si panmengti pasyasin punti si qantiimu tu Raq pasi qayau qanannumi satutu.
S.PHON: * ʁaris punti najau si pasjasin si panməŋti pasjasin punti si qantiimu tu ʁaq pasi qajau qanannumi satutu.
S.FORM: X Ralis punti nayau si pasyasin si panmengti pasyasin punti si qantiimu tu Raq pasi qayau qanannumi satutu.
S.PHON: * ʁaris punti najau si pasjasin si panməŋti pasjasin punti si qantiimu tu ʁaq pasi qajau qanannumi satutu.
S.TRANSL: XXX. 工作完成後,一定會照相. 一定會照相. 工作結束後,你們會喝酒,可能也會吃午餐.

TRANSL.notes: XXX. After finishing the job, you'll surely take pictures. (We'll) take pictures. After finishing the job, you'll drink wine and perhaps have lunch.

S.TRANSL: XXX. After finishing the job, you'll surely take pictures. take pictures. After finishing the job, you'll drink wine and perhaps have lunch.

S.FORM: ita mai smanu.
S.PHON: ita mai smanu.
S.FORM: ita mai smanu.
S.PHON: ita mai smanu.
S.TRANSL: 不知道,沒有講
I have no idea. They didn't tell us.

S.FORM: qawman yau 'may naqaya sapaqanan timaimu.
S.PHON: qawman jau ʔmaj naqaja sapaqanan timaimu.
S.FORM: qawman yau 'may naqaya sapaqanan timaimu.
S.PHON: qawman jau ʔmaj naqaja sapaqanan timaimu.
S.TRANSL: 一定有給你們吃的飯.
There must be rice for you to eat.

S.FORM: mai smanu kinaniay smani tanawyan mai smanu.
S.PHON: mai smanu kinaniaj smani tanawjan mai smanu.
S.FORM: mai smanu kinaniay smani tanawyan mai smanu.
S.PHON: mai smanu kinaniaj smani tanawjan mai smanu.
S.TRANSL: 沒有講那邊有幾個人.
They didn't tell us how many people there will be.

S.FORM: m mai smanu tu kinaniay ala tu kelawkawayay ta a walu duki zinna Raw.
S.PHON: m mai smanu tu kinaniaj ara tu kərawkawajaj ta a waru ɮuki z~rinna ʁaw.
S.FORM: m mai smanu tu kinaniay ala tu kelawkawayay ta a walu duki zinna Raw.
S.PHON: m mai smanu tu kinaniaj ara tu kərawkawajaj ta a waru ɮuki z~rinna ʁaw.
S.TRANSL: - 沒有講有幾個拿那個工作的人. 八點嗎?
- They didn't say how many people got the job. At eight o'clock?

S.FORM: peitiam qawtukati zinna nani.
S.PHON: pəitiam qawtukati z~rinna nani.
S.FORM: peitiam qawtukati zinna nani.
S.PHON: pəitiam qawtukati z~rinna nani.
S.TRANSL: 他說,「八點你們就要來」.
"You have to come at eight," he said.

S.FORM: m taRbabi si ya yau a qaya tiiza qaya tisyuRwa tangi qaya tu.
S.PHON: m taʁβaβi si ja jau a qaja tiiz~ra qaja tisjuʁwa taŋi qaja tu.
S.FORM: m taRbabi si ya yau a qaya tiiza qaya tisyuRwa tangi qaya tu.
S.PHON: m taʁβaβi si ja jau a qaja tiiz~ra qaja tisjuʁwa taŋi qaja tu.
S.TRANSL: - [翻譯漏失] XXX.SyuRwa剛才有來.
- [Translation missing] XXX. SyuRwa just came.

S.FORM: qawtuka taRbabi patuqazakaniq syasin na tamaku suRabka taRbabi peitiam zinna.
S.PHON: qawtuka taʁβaβi patuqaz~rakaniq sjasin na tamaku suʁaβka taʁβaβi pəitiam z~rinna.
S.FORM: qawtuka taRbabi patuqazakaniq syasin na tamaku suRabka taRbabi peitiam zinna.
S.PHON: qawtuka taʁβaβi patuqaz~rakaniq sjasin na tamaku suʁaβka taʁβaβi pəitiam z~rinna.
S.TRANSL: 她說,「明天要來,我們要把爸爸的相片掛上去,早上八點早一點來.」

TRANSL.notes: She told me, 'Come (to my place) tomorrow morning. We're going to hang my father's photo (on the wall). Come earlier at eight tomorrow morning.'

S.TRANSL: She told me, 'Come tomorrow morning. We're going to hang my father's photo . Come earlier at eight tomorrow morning.'

S.FORM: azasakati nwazingku pasazui si.
S.PHON: az~rasakati nwaz~riŋku pasaz~rui si.
S.FORM: azasakati nwazingku pasazui si.
S.PHON: az~rasakati nwaz~riŋku pasaz~rui si.

TRANSL.notes: 我要拿著我的東西去那邊(之後就可以直接到學校).

S.TRANSL: 我要拿著我的東西去那邊 .
I'll take my things over there.

S.FORM: pazaqisakati qawqaiku matiw sa qaqu ya tataqsian nani.
S.PHON: paz~raqisakati qawqaiku matiw sa qaqu ja tataqsian nani.
S.FORM: pazaqisakati qawqaiku matiw sa qaqu ya tataqsian nani.
S.PHON: paz~raqisakati qawqaiku matiw sa qaqu ja tataqsian nani.

TRANSL.notes: (照片)掛上去了,我才可以去學校.

S.TRANSL: 掛上去了,我才可以去學校.

TRANSL.notes: I'll hang (the photo on the wall first) so that I can go to school afterwards.

S.TRANSL: I'll hang so that I can go to school afterwards.

S.FORM: oh punapaisu tayan saiza sepaw tiwaqan qawqaisu matiwti taqaquan.
S.PHON: *h punapaisu tajan saiz~ra səpaw tiwaqan qawqaisu matiwti taqaquan.
S.FORM: oh punapaisu tayan saiza sepaw tiwaqan qawqaisu matiwti taqaquan.
S.PHON: *h punapaisu tajan saiz~ra səpaw tiwaqan qawqaisu matiwti taqaquan.
S.TRANSL: 你先到那邊拜Waq,才可以去學校.
You go there first to pour wine for Waq and you may go to school afterwards.

S.FORM: nayauti.
S.PHON: najauti.
S.FORM: nayauti.
S.PHON: najauti.
S.TRANSL: 就是那樣.
That's it.

S.FORM: ninima patuqaz qaya.
S.PHON: ninima patuqaz~r qaja.
S.FORM: ninima patuqaz qaya.
S.PHON: ninima patuqaz~r qaja.
S.TRANSL: 那麼快就要掛上去?

TRANSL.notes: (How come they) hang the photo immediately?

S.TRANSL: hang the photo immediately?

S.FORM: mai mai tu sizapkan ay si.
S.PHON: mai mai tu siz~rapkan aj si.
S.FORM: mai mai tu sizapkan ay si.
S.PHON: mai mai tu siz~rapkan aj si.
S.TRANSL: 沒有四十天的規定.

TRANSL.notes: (They) don't have the custom of (hanging the photo after) forty days.

S.TRANSL: don't have the custom of forty days.

S.FORM: oh izaanna kebalan pisapatannati zanaay Raw mai.
S.PHON: *h iz~raanna kəβaran pisapatannati z~ranaaj ʁaw mai.
S.FORM: oh izaanna kebalan pisapatannati zanaay Raw mai.
S.PHON: *h iz~raanna kəβaran pisapatannati z~ranaaj ʁaw mai.

TRANSL.notes: -- 他們隨便弄.當初葬禮是用噶瑪蘭的,沒有信什麼(四十天的規定).

S.TRANSL: - 他們隨便弄.當初葬禮是用噶瑪蘭的,沒有信什麼 .
- They did it informally. They held the funeral in Kavalan's way, so they don't have such a custom.
